name: Paragon ID SA
summary: Paragon ID SA provides identification solutions worldwide. The company offers various terminals, including couplers, readers, and accessories; traceability and stock, radio frequency identification (RFID), security, and durable labels; and container tracking, secure application module, mobile ticketing, operational maintenance, brand protection, customer relationship management, stock management, and access control solutions. It also provides contactless smartcards, magnetic and contactless tickets, passport e-covers, identification documents, timed use tickets, dual interface smart cards, advertickets, and consumables, as well as near field communication labels, tags or stickers. In addition, the company offers secure service solutions comprising card and document personalization; and eTrust that transforms secure paper-based products into intelligent documents. It serves various clients in aviation, smart cities, pharmaceutical, mobility, health, mass transit and public transport, manufacturing, sport and leisure, parking, automotive, gaming, higher education, logistics, luxury products, agriculture/food, secure ID, and retail industries. The company is based in Mougins, France. Paragon ID SA is a subsidiary of Paragon Group Limited.
